title: [Calyx] Add required ports to components.
body:
Closes #1408.
Adds required ports to Calyx components, and verifies that they exist. This is a step 0 required for the RemoveGroups pass, which needs to access a few of these ports.

A next step may either be:
1. Using types, e.g. `!calyx.clock_type` (this would also require creating our own logical operators since Comb requires integers)
2. Using attributes, perhaps mapping an input or output index to some Attribute.
3. ???
